# Test basic commands

# version should print something
exec agentmux version
stdout 'agentmux .*'

# help should print
exec agentmux --help
stdout 'Personal Multi-Agent Orchestrator'

# init without devcontainer should create config
exec agentmux init
stdout 'Initialized .* file'

# list should show empty message when no sessions exist
exec agentmux list
stdout 'No agent sessions found'

# plan create
exec agentmux plan create 'Test Plan' -d 'A test plan description'
stdout 'Plan plan-001 created: Test Plan'
stdout 'Status: .* draft'

# plan list
exec agentmux plan list
stdout 'plan-001.*Test Plan.*draft'

# plan approve
exec agentmux plan approve plan-001
stdout 'Plan plan-001 approved'

# plan reject
exec agentmux plan create 'Reject Plan'
stdout 'Plan plan-002 created'
exec agentmux plan reject plan-002 -r 'No good'
stdout 'Plan plan-002 rejected'

# plan delete
exec agentmux plan delete plan-002
stdout 'Plan plan-002 deleted'

# agents should list built-ins
exec agentmux agents
stdout 'claude.*preset.*installed'
stdout 'shell.*preset.*built-in'
